params.targetChainId: Target chain ID for cross-chain orders

findMatchingOrder(address,address,uint25.details: Find a matching order for auto-swap (opposite token pair with compatible amounts)

params.amountIn: The input amount of the order to match
params.amountOut: The output amount the order wants to receive
params.tokenIn: The input token of the order to match
params.tokenOut: The output token of the order to match

returns.matchedOrderId: The matching order ID, or bytes32(0) if no match found

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

removeFromPairIndex(bytes32).details: Remove an order from the pair index (called when order is filled/cancelled)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateOrderFill(bytes32,uint256).details: Update order fill status (for partial fills)

params.amountFilled: Amount filled in this transaction (in terms of amountOut)

updateOrderStatus(bytes32,uint8).details: Update order status (restricted to authorized components)
